user_feedback: make me move faster, and make it so that enemies  do less damage, and make sure that there are 2 easy levels, 2 medium levels, and 2 hard levels. and when I use Z, I want to be able to do a 3 combo hit instead of only doing a single hit when I press Z, i want to be able to press 3 Zs in sequence that deal a 3 hit combo. and I want to be able to dash in the air, execute!
analysis:
- Issue identified:
    1. Movement speed is too slow.
    2. Enemies deal too much damage.
    3. Level progression is 5 levels, needs to be 6 (2 Easy, 2 Medium, 2 Hard).
    4. Attack system is single-hit with long cooldown, needs 3-hit combo system.
    5. Dash is restricted to ground, needs air dash capability.
- Files affected: `globals.js`, `entities.js`, `levels.js`.
- Changes needed:
    - `globals.js`: Update `maxLevels` to 6.
    - `entities.js`:
        - `Player`: Increase speed (5->8). Add `canAirDash` logic. Update `dodge` to allow air usage. Update `attack` to support 3-hit combo with variable cooldowns. Update `update` to handle gravity/air-dash reset.
        - `Enemy`: Reduce base damage values.
    - `levels.js`: Update `loadLevel` to map 6 levels to 3 difficulty tiers and adjust enemy scaling.
